ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokemon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokemon */,
  "type_1" TEXT /* Primary type of the Pokemon */,
  "type_2" TEXT /* Secondary type of the Pokemon (if applicable) */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation the Pokemon belongs to */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points provided by the Pokemon */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the Pokemon */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the Pokemon */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokemon is legendary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolutions" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution entry */,
  "evolving_from" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokemon that evolves from */,
  "evolving_to" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokemon that evolves to */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level required for evolution */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* ID of the condition required for evolution (if applicable) */,
  "evolution_type" INTEGER /* ID of the type of evolution (e.g., level, item) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the evolution can occur (if applicable) */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day required for evolution (e.g., day, night) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_evolution_type FOREIGN KEY ("evolution_type") REFERENCES evolution_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_evolving_to FOREIGN KEY ("evolving_to") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES evolution_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_evolving_from FOREIGN KEY ("evolving_from") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolution_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evolution condition (e.g., using a certain item) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item required for evolution */,
  "friendship_level" INTEGER /* Required friendship level for evolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolution_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the evolution type (e.g., Level, Item) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evolution type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "trainer_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the trainer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_pokemon" (
  "trainer_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer-Pokemon relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who owns the Pokemon */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokemon owned by the trainer */,
  "captured_at" TEXT /* Date when the Pokemon was captured */,
  "current_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the Pokemon */,
  "current_experience" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the Pokemon */,
  "is_favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokemon is marked as a favorite by the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_pokemon_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_pokemon_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)
